2397960.name: Chess President - Challenge
2397960.description:
Chess President - Challenge

Challengers in the game:
You can choose 6 kinds of power to arm yourself.
You can choose from 1~3 evenly matched force duels.
You can choose from 4~10 strong to weak power duels.

Challenger leaders in the game:
There are 6 social development levels to choose from.
There are 6 economic construction levels to choose from.
There are 6 levels of political awareness to choose from.

Icon:
0-0 Patriot or Warrior
1-1 Society 1-2 Morality
2-1 Economy 2-2 Law
3-1 Country 3-2 Politics
2397960.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
